name: Cranberry Whipped Cream Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple and reserve the syrup.
2. Add boiling water to the reserved syrup to make 1 cup.
3. Dissolve the gelatin in the hot liquid.
4. Stir in the cranberry sauce and orange peel; chill until partially set.
5. Fold in the orange sections and pineapple.
6. Whip the cream until soft peaks form; fold into the fruit mixture.
7. Pour into a 6-cup mold.
8. Chill until set.
9. Unmold and garnish with frosted fruit.
FROSTED FRUIT:
1. Break 1 pound green grapes into small clusters.
2. Dip the grapes and 1/2 pound cranberries into beaten egg white.
3. Drain; dip the fruit in sugar to coat.
4. Place the fruit on a rack to dry for 2 hours.
